# ILMessageFilterSubAction.promotionalCoupons

**Case**

Prevents the system from showing the message normally, filtered as an Coupons message.

## Declaration

```swift
case promotionalCoupons
```

## Promotional Subactions

- **ILMessageFilterSubAction.promotionalOthers**: Prevents the system from showing the message normally, filtered as an Others message.
- **ILMessageFilterSubAction.promotionalOffers**: Prevents the system from showing the message normally, filtered as an Offers message.
